---
title: "Resume"
toc: false
---

[Download PDF](assets/william_song_resume_2p.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

---

## Experience

### [Job Title] -- [Company]
*[Start date] -- [End date]*

- Bullet describing what you did and the impact
- Quantify where possible (e.g. reduced query runtime by 40%)

---

## Education

### Master of Data Science -- UBC
*2024 -- 2025*

Coursework: statistical inference, machine learning, data visualization, databases, cloud computing, collaborative software development.

### [Bachelor's degree] -- [Institution]
*[Years]*

---

## Skills

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| Languages | Python, R, SQL |
| ML / stats | scikit-learn, statsmodels, tidymodels |
| Data | pandas, DuckDB, PostgreSQL, dbt |
| Viz | ggplot2, matplotlib, Plotly, Quarto |
| Infra | Git, Docker, GitHub Actions |
